ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Maylender, Rosetini delivered an oration at a meeting of the Academy on 7 December 1620, which was printed by Varischi. In this oration, the author recommends fellow academicians to seek protection from Francesco Erizzo, procurator of San Marco, `Revisore di Frotezze`, and `riformatore` of the Studio in Padua.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
